name: Parmesan-Sesame Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each slice of bread into 8 sticks and arrange on ungreased baking sheets.
2. Brush the bread sticks lightly with margarine.
3. Sprinkle evenly with Parmesan cheese and sesame seeds.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown. Serve immediately.
From: All New Cookbook For Diabetics and Their Families
